title: [Feature Request] Multiple Networking
body:
Containers can join multiple networks which allows you to provide fine grained network policy for connectivity and isolation. Docker has a command ```docker network connect``` to let containers join multiple network, but it's inconvenient for podman to do this.

https://success.docker.com/article/multiple-docker-networks

comments.body: Podman allows you to do this, but you must specify the networks at creation time with `--net=<network_name>`

I am also looking for the same. Doesn't look like it is supported
The --net option at the time of container creation allows container to connect to a single network.
The "docker network connect" with the docker daemon used to allow connecting container to multiple isolated networks

List all networks you want to connect to, separate by commas.

E.G. `podman run --net=network1,network2,network3`
